date_text: Thu, Apr 2nd • 12:00 PM AEDT - Sun, Apr 5th • 10:00 PM AEDT
description: “We are as passionate about creating first-class craft beer, as we are at building a cool place to enjoy it. From brewing our first batches in the garage of our share house, to carving out our niche in the hospitality industry - we are a small crew of real people with a shared love of crafting exceptionally wonderful beer. We strive to connect with all our ingredients, the land they were grown on, and the people that plant, pick, deliver and pour.”- Precinct Brewing Tap List: - Raspberry Sour - Mango Sour - Pacific Ale - Lager - Pale Ale - Yuzu Wit Bier - Experiment #42 Hazy IPA - Dry Irish Stout - Tropical Fruitburst ALE - WCIPA - Devils Island Tropical Stout - Red

date_text: Thu, Apr 9th • 12:00 PM AEDT - Sun, Apr 12th • 10:00 PM AEDT
description: After last week’s massive Tank to Tap showing, Akasha Brewing Company are back at Hotel Sweeney’s — and they’re bringing the goods for a birthday tap takeover on the rooftop. This time around, they’re pouring one of their most iconic and limited releases — Wooden Leg Triple IPA — a huge, hop-loaded anniversary beer that only comes around once a year. Expect big, bold flavours with a seriously punchy profile. Alongside that, you’ll find a stacked lineup including Korben D (a cult favourite double IPA), Snapper IPA, A super limited watermelon Snapper plus a few of the classics that have made Akasha one of the most respected names in Aussie craft beer All of that, poured fresh on one of Sydney’s best rooftop pubs. Tap List:- - Wooden Leg IIIPA - Korben DIPA - Snapper WCIPA - Watermelon Snapper WCIPA - Red Flag American Pale - Rye the Lightning Rye Pale - Hopsmith IPA - Mosaic IPA - Freshwater Pale - Canada Bay XPA - Super Chill Pacific Ale - Super Chill Lager
